title: koyamacalia tebakoensis
intro: Koyamacalia tebakoensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to Japan. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and its herbal preparations are still used today in some parts of Japan for its potential health benefits.
